positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl has sharp, angular features, radiating a glowing, bioluminescent light that contrasts sharply with a deep indigo and midnight blue background. Use linework and negative space heavily, creating a clean, tattoo-style aesthetic. The composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for chest printing. Lighting is dramatic chiaroscuro, with the glow emanating from the owl's eyes and feathers. Include subtle, abstract constellations and nebula swirls in the background, rendered in deep jewel tones of teal and sapphire. Highly detailed, high contrast, vector art quality, woodblock print influence, elegant silhouettes, isolated composition, printable artwork.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, out of frame, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, noise, messy, realistic photography, 3d render, vibrant clutter, messy details
